testcase.name: testNestedPredicateToString
testcase.system-out: 嵌套条件: VexPredicate(logic=and, expressions=[VexExpression(field=status, op=eq, value=ACTIVE), VexPredicate(logic=or, expressions=[VexExpression(field=username, op=exp, value=%张%), VexExpression(field=username, op=exp, value=%李%)])])

testcase.name: testVexPredicateToString
testcase.system-out: AND条件: VexPredicate(logic=and, expressions=[VexExpression(field=status, op=eq, value=ACTIVE), VexExpression(field=age, op=gte, value=18)]) OR条件: VexPredicate(logic=or, expressions=[VexExpression(field=username, op=exp, value=%张%), VexExpression(field=username, op=exp, value=%李%)])

testcase.name: testSortOrderToString
testcase.system-out: 升序: createTime ASC 降序: updateTime DESC

testcase.name: testVexExpressionToString
testcase.system-out: 表达式: VexExpression(field=status, op=eq, value=ACTIVE) 范围表达式: VexExpression(field=age, op=between, value=[Ljava.lang.Object;@50de186c) NULL表达式: VexExpression(field=deletedAt, op=is_null, value=null)

testcase.name: testQueryCriteriaToString
testcase.system-out: 完整查询: VexQueryCriteria{select=[id, username, email], exclude=[password], filter=VexPredicate(logic=and, expressions=[VexExpression(field=status, op=eq, value=ACTIVE)]), orderBy=[createTime DESC], paging=page=0, size=20}
